creator: exploringlondon
caption:
@qinwanlondon is now open, and it’s dedicated to dates 🤎 This place is perfect for date lovers, with all things dates, from filled dates to chocolate covered dates to date cakes, date ice cream and even date lattes and matcha! 

Who are you taking for a date? 🤎
📍 The Chancery Rosewood, 30 Grosvenor Sq, London W1K 9AN
💷 Each date is £4 or you can get a box of 4 for £16, or 6 for £24
